title: Any Eva exclusivists here
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 04, 2007 10:52 am Otaprince wrote: the Eva Monkey forum seems to attract a lot of people who focus solely on Eva to the exclusion of all other anime, film, and life in general

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Sun Mar 04, 2007 11:28 am Reichu wrote: Otaprince wrote: the Eva Monkey forum seems to attract a lot of people who focus solely on Eva to the exclusion of all other anime, film, and life in general

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 04, 2007 1:41 pm YOU SAID "A LOT" OF PEOPLE I WANT A LIST DAMMIT

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Mar 04, 2007 2:21 pm Otaprince wrote: As for what influenced Eva, the Eva Monkey forum seems to attract a lot of people who focus solely on Eva to the exclusion of all other anime, film, and life in general, but Eva did not just appear from nowhere, springing from Adam's, err, Anno's rib, so to speak: it's the product of a very clear evolution by Studio Gainax, starting with Daicon and going through Honneamise, Gunbuster, and Nadia.

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Sun Mar 04, 2007 8:10 pm if i could ever have a perfect knowledge of Evangelion from Anno, i would trade the world. does that mean im obsessive?

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Sun Mar 04, 2007 9:37 pm Reichu wrote: YOU SAID "A LOT" OF PEOPLE I WANT A LIST DAMMIT

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Sun Mar 04, 2007 10:44 pm conformist.

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Sun Mar 04, 2007 11:02 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I think what has actually happened is that Eva has attracted a lot of people who were not especially interested in anime to begin with. Well ,speaking for myself, though I enjoy the odd anime, I could by no manner or means be described as an avid viewer. I'm not sure how much this impairs my ability to fully appreciated the show. I think it can be seen as a work in its own right, even if it is full of cliches.

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Sun Mar 04, 2007 11:06 pm wish my class was cool like that...

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Sun Mar 04, 2007 11:16 pm Fearthebait wrote: wish my class was cool like that...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Mar 05, 2007 3:05 pm Robots that only kids can pilot? Cliche

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Mar 05, 2007 3:47 pm I like Eva a lot, and I rank it highly amongst the all time greatest anime. However, I would hardly say I'm obsessed. It's probably been two years since I last watched it. I suppose my point is that even though a lot of us post here, that doesn't mean Eva is the end all, be all of anime for us.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Mar 05, 2007 6:05 pm Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: Reichu wrote: YOU SAID "A LOT" OF PEOPLE I WANT A LIST DAMMIT

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Mon Mar 05, 2007 6:16 pm Ornette wrote: Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: Reichu wrote: YOU SAID "A LOT" OF PEOPLE I WANT A LIST DAMMIT

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Mar 05, 2007 6:25 pm Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: Ornette wrote: Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: Reichu wrote: YOU SAID "A LOT" OF PEOPLE I WANT A LIST DAMMIT

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Mon Mar 05, 2007 7:17 pm Ornette wrote: Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: Ornette wrote: Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: Reichu wrote: YOU SAID "A LOT" OF PEOPLE I WANT A LIST DAMMIT

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Mon Mar 05, 2007 9:36 pm I'm currently writing an essay for my English class over the Conflicts in Evangelion. :) I have to write 5 pages, but I already have 4 and I still haven't finished...

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Mon Mar 05, 2007 10:33 pm 4 =/= 5 so i would hope your not finished :)

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Tue Mar 06, 2007 6:25 am Yup lol

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 06, 2007 3:12 pm Yay, I'm number 10 on the list because I have no life. ^^;
